notes: Real news view counts are usually not public; this version uses open RSS sources and avoids paywalled links.
Add comma-separated RSS URLs to NEWS_FEED_URLS in .env.local to include TLDR-style newsletters or other readable feeds.
AI items must pass freshness and evidence-chain gates; application items need at least two anchors with one primary anchor.
First-read summaries and AI application risk analysis use DeepSeek only, not GPT; local rules are used only as fallback.

articles.title: What would it mean for Ukraine if it actually starts producing Patriot missiles?
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.summary: 本文探讨了如果乌克兰获准生产爱国者导弹可能带来的战略影响，包括增强其防空能力和改变战场态势。值得关注的是，这标志着美国对乌克兰军事支持的重大升级，可能影响冲突的长期走向。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键启示：技术转移和本地化生产能显著提升受援国的自主防御能力，但需考虑供应链、知识产权和地缘政治风险。

en.summary: This article analyzes the strategic implications of Ukraine potentially producing Patriot missiles, including enhanced air defense and shifted battlefield dynamics. It is worth reading as it signals a major escalation in U.S. military support and could reshape the conflict's trajectory.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Technology transfer and local production can significantly boost a recipient's defensive autonomy, but must account for supply chain, intellectual property, and geopolitical risks.
en.title: What Would Patriot Missile Production Mean for Ukraine?

articles.title: First patients enrolled in record-breaking Ebola treatment trial in DRC
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.summary: 刚果民主共和国伊图里地区启动了埃博拉治疗试验，创纪录地在疫情被宣布为国际公共卫生紧急事件仅六周后就开始招募患者。两种药物正在试验中，有望在数月内降低死亡率，这是目前尚无获批药物情况下的重要进展。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该新闻展示了在疫情爆发后快速启动临床试验的可行性，强调了国际合作和快速响应对于应对公共卫生危机的重要性。

en.summary: A groundbreaking Ebola treatment trial in the Democratic Republic of the Congo has enrolled its first patients just six weeks after the outbreak was declared a public health emergency. Two drugs are being tested in the Ituri region, offering hope to reduce mortality rates in the absence of approved treatments.
en.failureAnalysis: This news highlights the feasibility of rapidly launching clinical trials during outbreaks, underscoring the importance of international collaboration and swift response in public health emergencies.
en.title: Record-Breaking Ebola Treatment Trial Launches in DRC

articles.title: Fire breaks out at a pub in Bangkok, killing at least 27 people, officials say
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.summary: 曼谷一家酒吧发生火灾，造成至少27人死亡。现场视频显示火势猛烈，浓烟从门口涌出。这起事件突显了公共场所消防安全的重要性，值得关注。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键启示：公共场所需加强消防检查和应急措施，以预防类似悲剧。

en.summary: A fire broke out at a pub in Bangkok, killing at least 27 people. Footage shows a huge blaze and smoke pouring from the entrance. This highlights the critical need for fire safety in public venues.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Strengthen fire inspections and emergency protocols in public spaces to prevent such tragedies.
en.title: Fire at Bangkok Pub Kills at Least 27

articles.title: DietrichGebert/ponytail
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 该项目提出让AI代理模仿最懒的高级开发者的思维方式，强调“最好的代码是没写的代码”，旨在减少不必要的代码生成。值得关注是因为它挑战了AI编码的常规思路，可能提升开发效率，但需要验证实际效果。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该理念可能失败，因为“懒惰”在工程中常被误解为低效，实际高级开发者的“懒惰”基于深厚经验，AI难以复制这种判断力。此外，项目缺乏具体实现细节和部署路径，用户价值不明确，可能难以获得工程验证和社区采纳。

en.summary: This project proposes making AI agents emulate the mindset of the laziest senior developer, emphasizing that the best code is the code never written. It is worth reading because it challenges conventional AI coding approaches and could boost efficiency, but its real-world impact remains unproven.
en.failureAnalysis: The idea may fail because 'laziness' in engineering is often misinterpreted; senior devs' laziness relies on deep experience that AI cannot replicate. Without concrete implementation or deployment path, the project risks lacking validation and adoption.
en.title: Ponytail: AI Agent That Thinks Like the Laziest Senior Dev

articles.title: Directly Responsible Individuals (DRI)
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: No clear evidence
articles.summary: 本文介绍了“直接负责人”（DRI）的概念，即对项目成败最终负责的个人，并强调在AI代理（如LLM驱动的智能体）日益普及的背景下，DRI必须由人类担任，因为机器无法承担真正的责任。文章引用IBM 1979年的观点，指出计算机永远不能做管理决策，这为组织如何将AI工具融入人类问责体系提供了重要思考。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键启示：即使AI代理能高效执行任务，最终的责任和决策权必须保留在人类手中，这是组织管理中不可妥协的原则。

en.summary: This article defines the concept of 'Directly Responsible Individuals' (DRI) as the person ultimately accountable for a project's success or failure, and argues that in the age of LLM-powered agents, DRIs must remain human because machines cannot be held accountable. It cites IBM's 1979 training slide to reinforce that computers should never make management decisions, offering a crucial perspective on integrating AI into human organizational structures.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Even as AI agents become more capable, ultimate accountability and decision-making authority must stay with humans—a non-negotiable principle for responsible management.
en.title: Directly Responsible Individuals (DRI) and AI Agents

articles.title: Clinical Translation of Brain-Computer Interface in China: A Landscape Analysis of Investigator-Initiated Trials, Registered Clinical Trials, and Regulatory Approval
articles.selectionReason: Open full-text paper; topic brain_computer_interface; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

paperCard.problem: 脑损伤（如中风、脊髓损伤）导致很多人失去运动或交流能力，现有疗法效果有限。脑机接口（BCI）能绕过受损神经，让大脑直接控制外部设备，但如何从实验室研究真正变成医院里能用的产品，在中国还缺少全面的分析。
paperCard.method: 作者从三个层面收集数据：中国临床试验注册中心的134项试验、26项研究者发起的早期试验、以及国家药监局批准的5个BCI产品。然后按技术类型（非侵入式、半侵入式、侵入式等）、疾病类型、时间趋势和地域分布进行统计分析。
paperCard.difference: 之前的研究多关注单一技术或某个应用领域，且数据较旧。这篇论文首次把早期试验、注册试验和获批产品放在一个框架里分析，覆盖了2023-2026年的最新进展，给出了更完整的中国BCI转化图景。
paperCard.innovation: 创新在于提供了一个“三层次”的量化分析框架（早期试验→注册试验→产品获批），并首次系统梳理了国家药监局对BCI医疗器械的分类定义标准，明确了什么才算真正的BCI医疗设备。
paperCard.implementation: 具体实现分三步：1）用关键词在ChiCTR数据库搜索并筛选出134项注册临床试验；2）从PubMed、CNKI等渠道收集26项早期试验；3）从药监局数据库获取5个获批产品信息。然后按技术类型（如EEG非侵入式、ECoG半侵入式、微电极阵列侵入式等）和疾病（如中风康复、脊髓损伤等）分类统计，用图表展示趋势。
paperCard.applications: 可用于中风后康复训练（如控制机械手）、脊髓损伤患者的辅助设备（如轮椅控制）、语言障碍患者的交流系统（如中文语音合成）、以及癫痫等疾病的闭环神经调控治疗。
technicalTerms: 脑机接口（BCI）：让大脑直接和电脑等设备通信的技术，不用通过手脚。
非侵入式：不用开刀，像戴帽子一样用头皮上的电极测脑电波。
半侵入式：把电极放在大脑表面（硬脑膜下或上），需要小手术但创伤比全植入小。
侵入式：把电极直接插进大脑组织里，信号最清晰但风险也最大。
闭环神经调控：设备能实时监测大脑信号，并根据信号自动调整电刺激，比如治疗癫痫。
研究者发起的试验（IIT）：由医生或研究机构自己发起的小规模早期试验，通常只有1-5个病人。
国家药监局（NMPA）：中国的药品和医疗器械监管机构，负责批准产品上市。

articles.summary: 这篇论文首次系统分析了中国脑机接口（BCI）从早期临床试验到产品获批的全链条现状，包括134项注册试验、26项研究者发起的试验和5个获批产品。它揭示了非侵入式BCI占主导、中风康复是主要应用方向，以及中国在2020年后临床试验快速增长的态势，对理解中国BCI产业现状和未来方向很有价值。
articles.failureAnalysis: 论文数据截止到2026年6月，但BCI技术发展极快，长期植入稳定性、临床标准化和算法泛化能力仍是关键瓶颈，这些限制可能影响结论的时效性和普适性。

en.summary: This paper provides the first quantitative analysis of China's BCI translational ecosystem, covering 134 registered trials, 26 investigator-initiated trials, and 5 approved products. It reveals that non-invasive systems dominate (79.1%), stroke rehabilitation is the leading indication (65.0%), and clinical trial registration has surged since 2020. It is worth reading for a comprehensive, data-driven view of China's BCI progress from lab to clinic.
en.failureAnalysis: The data cutoff is June 2026, but BCI technology evolves rapidly; long-term implant stability, lack of standardization, and algorithm generalizability remain critical barriers that may limit the timeliness and applicability of the findings.
en.title: Clinical Translation of Brain-Computer Interface in China: A Landscape Analysis of Investigator-Initiated Trials, Registered Clinical Trials, and Regulatory Approval

paperCard.problem: Neurological injuries like stroke and spinal cord injury cause irreversible loss of motor or communication functions. Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) can bypass damaged neural pathways to restore these functions, but a comprehensive analysis of how BCIs move from research to clinical products in China is lacking.
paperCard.method: The authors collected data from three sources: 134 registered clinical trials from the Chinese Clinical Trial Registry, 26 investigator-initiated trials from literature and institutional reports, and 5 NMPA-approved BCI products. They then analyzed these by technology type (non-invasive, semi-invasive, invasive, etc.), disease indication, temporal trends, and geographic distribution.
paperCard.difference: Previous reviews focused on single technologies or specific applications and used older data. This paper integrates all three tiers (IITs, registered trials, approved products) into one framework and covers the latest advances from 2023-2026, providing a more complete picture of China's BCI translation landscape.
paperCard.innovation: The innovation is a three-tier quantitative analysis framework (IIT → registered trial → product approval) and the first systematic application of NMPA's new classification criteria for BCI medical devices, clarifying what qualifies as a BCI medical device.
paperCard.implementation: Implementation involved three steps: 1) searching the ChiCTR database with keywords to identify 134 eligible registered trials; 2) collecting 26 IITs from PubMed, CNKI, and institutional websites; 3) retrieving 5 approved products from the NMPA database. Data were then categorized by technology type (e.g., EEG non-invasive, ECoG semi-invasive, microelectrode array invasive) and disease (e.g., stroke rehabilitation, spinal cord injury) and visualized with charts.
paperCard.applications: Applications include stroke rehabilitation (e.g., controlling robotic hands), assistive devices for spinal cord injury (e.g., wheelchair control), communication systems for speech-impaired patients (e.g., Chinese speech synthesis), and closed-loop neuromodulation for epilepsy.
technicalTerms: Brain-computer interface (BCI): Technology that enables direct communication between the brain and external devices without using muscles.
Non-invasive: No surgery required; uses electrodes on the scalp to measure brain waves, like wearing a cap.
Semi-invasive: Electrodes placed on the brain's surface (under or on the dura), requiring minor surgery but less invasive than full implantation.
Invasive: Electrodes inserted directly into brain tissue, providing the clearest signals but with the highest risk.
Closed-loop neuromodulation: A device that monitors brain signals in real time and automatically adjusts electrical stimulation, e.g., for epilepsy treatment.
Investigator-initiated trial (IIT): A small early-stage trial initiated by doctors or researchers, typically involving 1-5 patients.
NMPA: China's National Medical Products Administration, the regulatory agency that approves medical devices for market.

articles.title: Graph-Regularized Deep Learning for EEG-Based Emotion Recognition with Psychologically-Grounded Label Structure
articles.selectionReason: Open full-text paper; topic brain_computer_interface; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

paperCard.problem: 现有深度学习模型在做情绪识别时，把不同情绪类别当成完全独立的标签，比如把“开心”错分成“悲伤”和错分成“中性”都受到同样的惩罚。但心理学告诉我们，“开心”和“中性”更接近，而“开心”和“悲伤”差别很大。所以模型需要学会尊重情绪之间的心理距离。
paperCard.method: 作者构建了一个“情绪图”，把每种情绪看作图上的一个节点，用边连接心理上相近的情绪（比如“悲伤”和“恐惧”相连）。然后设计了三种正则化方法（图标签平滑、图拉普拉斯损失、切片Wasserstein距离），在训练时惩罚那些把情绪错分到远距离类别的错误。这样模型就学会了更符合心理学的分类。
paperCard.difference: 之前的方法通常用交叉熵损失，对所有错误一视同仁。这篇论文首次系统地将情绪拓扑结构（即情绪之间的心理距离）直接整合到训练目标中，而不是仅仅在数据层面或后处理中考虑。
paperCard.innovation: 创新点在于：1）提出了三种不同复杂度的图正则化策略，从简单的软标签到复杂的分布距离，都能利用情绪图结构；2）证明了这种正则化对多种主流模型（Transformer、CNN-Transformer混合、图神经网络）都有效，是架构无关的；3）提出了“邻近违规率”这一新指标，专门衡量模型是否犯了心理学上不合理的错误。
paperCard.implementation: 具体实现分三步：1）根据心理学理论（如Russell的环形模型）为情绪标签构建图，确定哪些情绪是相邻的；2）在训练时，除了标准的分类损失，还加上一个正则化损失，这个损失会根据情绪图上的距离对错误分类进行加权——距离越远，惩罚越大；3）通过交叉验证或自适应权重来平衡两个损失。关键技术词：图拉普拉斯（描述图上节点间距离的数学工具）、切片Wasserstein距离（一种高效计算两个分布之间距离的方法）。
paperCard.applications: 可以应用于：1）心理健康监测，如通过脑电信号追踪患者情绪变化；2）情感脑机接口，让设备更准确地理解用户情绪；3）消费级脑电设备（如Muse、Emotiv）上的日常情感计算应用；4）任何需要利用标签之间结构关系的分类任务，如医学诊断中的疾病严重程度分级。
technicalTerms: 图正则化：在训练模型时，利用一个图（节点和边组成的结构）来约束模型的行为，让模型学会尊重图上的关系。
情绪拓扑：指情绪在心理学空间中的排列方式，比如哪些情绪更相似、哪些更不同。
邻近违规率：衡量模型把情绪错分到心理上很远类别的比例，越低说明模型越符合心理学直觉。
图拉普拉斯：一种数学矩阵，可以计算图上任意两个节点之间的“距离”，这里用来衡量情绪之间的心理距离。
切片Wasserstein距离：一种快速计算两个概率分布之间差异的方法，这里用来衡量模型预测的情绪分布和真实情绪分布之间的差异，同时考虑情绪图结构。

articles.summary: 这篇论文提出了一种图正则化深度学习框架，用于基于脑电信号的情绪识别。它通过将情绪之间的心理关联性（如“开心”和“悲伤”距离较远）编码到训练过程中，显著提升了模型准确率并减少了不符合心理学的错误分类。值得阅读是因为它提供了一种架构无关、可复现的方法，能普遍提升现有模型的性能上限。
articles.failureAnalysis: 主要局限在于实验仅在两个公开数据集（SEED-IV和SEED-V）上验证，且情绪类别较少（4-5类），在更大规模或更细粒度的情绪分类任务上的效果尚不明确。另外，图结构的构建依赖于心理学理论（如Russell的环形模型），对于没有明确理论支撑的情绪标签集可能不适用。

en.summary: This paper proposes a graph-regularized deep learning framework for EEG-based emotion recognition. It encodes psychological relationships between emotions (e.g., 'happy' is far from 'sad') into the training process, significantly improving accuracy and reducing psychologically implausible misclassifications. It is worth reading because it provides an architecture-agnostic, reproducible method that consistently raises the performance ceiling of existing models.
en.failureAnalysis: The main limitation is that experiments were only conducted on two public datasets (SEED-IV and SEED-V) with a small number of emotion classes (4-5). Its effectiveness on larger or more fine-grained emotion taxonomies remains unclear. Additionally, the graph construction relies on psychological theories (e.g., Russell's circumplex model), which may not be available for all label sets.
en.title: Graph-Regularized Deep Learning for EEG-Based Emotion Recognition with Psychologically-Grounded Label Structure

paperCard.problem: Existing deep learning models treat emotion categories as independent labels, penalizing misclassifications equally (e.g., confusing 'happy' with 'sad' is penalized the same as confusing 'happy' with 'neutral'). However, psychology tells us that some emotions are more similar than others. Models need to respect these psychological distances.
paperCard.method: The authors construct an 'emotion graph' where each emotion is a node and edges connect psychologically similar emotions (e.g., 'sad' and 'fear'). They then design three regularization methods (Graph Label Smoothing, Graph Laplacian loss, Sliced Wasserstein distance) that penalize misclassifications to distant emotion categories more heavily during training. This teaches the model to make psychologically plausible predictions.
paperCard.difference: Previous methods typically use cross-entropy loss, treating all errors equally. This paper is the first to systematically integrate emotion topology (the structure of psychological distances between emotions) directly into the training objective, rather than only in data preprocessing or post-processing.
paperCard.innovation: The innovations are: 1) Proposing three graph regularization strategies of varying complexity that all leverage the emotion graph; 2) Demonstrating that this regularization is architecture-agnostic, benefiting Transformers, CNN-Transformer hybrids, and Graph Neural Networks; 3) Introducing a 'Proximity Violation' metric to specifically measure psychologically implausible errors.
paperCard.implementation: Implementation has three steps: 1) Build an emotion graph based on psychological theory (e.g., Russell's circumplex model) to define which emotions are adjacent; 2) During training, add a regularization loss to the standard classification loss that weights misclassifications by their distance on the emotion graph—further distances incur larger penalties; 3) Balance the two losses via cross-validation or adaptive weighting. Key technical terms: Graph Laplacian (a mathematical tool to compute distances on a graph), Sliced Wasserstein distance (an efficient method to compute the distance between two probability distributions).
paperCard.applications: Applications include: 1) Mental health monitoring, e.g., tracking patient emotional states via EEG; 2) Affective brain-computer interfaces for more accurate emotion understanding; 3) Consumer EEG devices (e.g., Muse, Emotiv) for everyday affective computing; 4) Any classification task where label relationships matter, such as medical diagnosis severity grading.
technicalTerms: Graph regularization: Constraining model behavior during training using a graph structure (nodes and edges) to respect relationships in that graph.
Emotion topology: The arrangement of emotions in a psychological space, indicating which emotions are more similar or different.
Proximity Violation: A metric measuring the proportion of misclassifications that go to psychologically distant categories; lower is better.
Graph Laplacian: A mathematical matrix that can compute distances between any two nodes in a graph, used here to measure psychological distance between emotions.

Sliced Wasserstein distance: A fast method to compute the difference between two probability distributions, used here to compare predicted and true emotion distributions while respecting the emotion graph.
